params.kwh: Jumlah kWh yang ingin dibeli (dalam unit 1e18 = 1 kWh)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

buyEnergy(address,uint256).notice: Buyer membeli energi — MON masuk escrow ke contract ini

cancelTrade(uint256).notice: Cancel trade dan refund MON ke buyer

confirmDelivery(uint256).notice: Seller (atau backend wallet) konfirmasi pengiriman — MON dilepas ke seller, NFT di-mint ke buyer

quoteEnergy(address,uint256).notice: Helper: hitung berapa MON yang harus dibayar untuk N kWh dari seller ini

registerProducer(uint256,uint256).notice: Seller mendaftar sebagai producer dan set listing

totalTrades().notice: Total semua trade yang pernah dibuat
